title: Selling Ebooks Without Stripe: Which Option Actually Works for You — No PayPal Required
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: PayPal and Stripe block creators in dozens of countries. Here is the infrastructure that works everywhere they don't.

content.text: You're a Nigerian digital creator with a fantastic ebook to sell, but PayPal and Stripe have blocked you from accessing their platforms due to geographic restrictions. The reality is, you're not alone. Many talented creators in your shoes face the same frustration every day. The problem is, you need a reliable way to sell your ebook without breaking the bank or jumping through hoops. Let's cut to the chase – you need an alternative that actually works.
What Each Option Actually Offers

PayPal and Stripe are off-limits, but that doesn't mean you can't sell ebooks. Other options like Gumroad and Payhip might seem like safe alternatives, but they come with their own set of limitations. Gumroad, for instance, charges a 3.5% + 30¢ per sale, and Payhip takes a 2.9% + 30¢ cut. These fees might not seem like much, but they add up quickly, eating into your profits. Meanwhile, NOWPayments offers a more competitive 0.9% + 25¢ per transaction, but with a twist – you'll need to integrate it with a crypto-friendly infrastructure like Unchained Commerce's Full Stack Bundle.
How They Handle Restricted Countries

When it comes to restricted countries, the story gets even murkier. PayPal and Stripe are notoriously strict, with long lists of countries they refuse to serve. Gumroad and Payhip might seem like a better bet, but they still have their own blacklists. NOWPayments, on the other hand, is a crypto-native payment processor that operates on a global scale, with no restrictions on country or currency. That means you can sell your ebooks to anyone, anywhere, without worrying about getting blocked.
Payment Speed, Fees, and Real Costs

When it comes down to payment speed, fees, and real costs, NOWPayments is a clear winner. With instant automated delivery and a flat 0.9% + 25¢ per transaction fee, you'll get more of your hard-earned cash in your pocket. Meanwhile, Gumroad and Payhip charge more for their services, with longer processing times to boot. And let's not forget the real cost – your sanity. Dealing with restrictive payment processors can be a nightmare, but NOWPayments makes it smooth sailing.
Gumroad and Payhip charge more for their services than NOWPayments.
Automation and Delivery Capabilities

Automation and delivery capabilities are where NOWPayments truly shines. With Unchained Commerce's Full Stack Bundle, you get instant automated delivery, PDF receipts, and no payment processor account required. That means you can focus on what matters most – creating great content – while NOWPayments handles the nitty-gritty details. Meanwhile, Gumroad and Payhip require more manual intervention, which can slow down your sales and increase your stress levels.
Which One to Choose Based on Your Situation
How do I sell digital products if PayPal is not available in my country?

The direct answer is NOWPayments combined with the Core Shop Engine. NOWPayments is a crypto payment processor that requires no KYC from merchants and no account creation from buyers. It supports over 300 coins and sends a webhook to your backend when a payment confirms on-chain. The Core Shop Engine receives that webhook, verifies the transaction, generates a receipt, and delivers the product automatically. The key difference between this and a platform workaround is that it is not a workaround — it is a different infrastructure layer entirely. There is no platform that can suspend your access, no compliance team that can flag your account, and no payout schedule that delays your revenue. Your funds go directly to a wallet you control the moment a transaction confirms.
NOWPayments operates on a global scale, with no restrictions on country or currency.

If you're a digital creator looking to sell ebooks without PayPal or Stripe, you're not alone. Many creators face similar challenges every day. But with NOWPayments and Unchained Commerce's Full Stack Bundle, you can break free from restrictive payment processors and focus on what really matters – creating great content.
